name: Garden Harvest Chicken Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups chicken breasts without skin ( cubed, cooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter.
2. Add the onion and cook, stirring often until tender.
3. Combine the flour, bouillon, thyme, and pepper and stir into the onion mixture.
4. Cook, stirring often, for 1 minute.
5. Stir in the milk gradually; cook and stir until the mixture thickens.
6. Remove from heat and stir in the potatoes, chicken, vegetables, and parsley.
7. Spoon hot filling into the prepared crust.
8. Cover with the top crust, seal the edges, and cut slits into the top crust to allow steam to escape during baking.
9. Bake at 375 degrees for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until the filling begins to bubble and the crust edges are brown.
